name: Felvideki Finom Nulleves (Hare Soup from Nort
recipeIngredient: Hare, head, neck, heart, lungs, liver, kidneys
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not wash the hare parts excessively; try to retain some blood.
2. Place all parts except the liver in a pot with 3 quarts of water and bring to a boil. Skim well.
3. Peel vegetables (except onion) and dice them. Add to the pot along with caraway seeds and 1 tablespoon of salt. Maintain a very low heat and let the soup simmer.
4. Melt lard, add minced onion, crushed garlic, and diced hare liver. Sprinkle with black pepper. Cook onion and liver quickly, then sprinkle with flour. Stir well and cook for a few minutes longer.
5. Add a ladle of broth from the pot to the mixture. Stir well and pour back into the soup pot.
6. Add rice to the soup pot and cook until done. Adjust salt as needed.
7. Variation: For added flavor, add 3 tablespoons of lemon juice or whip together lemon juice with sour cream just before serving.
